task description requirement and exact column name in the palmerpenguins dataset downloaded
task description requirement and exact column name in the palmerpenguins dataset downloaded

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real Palmer Penguins dataset downloaded from Allison Horst's GitHub repository. The required dataset is placed at /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/penguins.csv and contains the expected columns 'flipper_length_mm' and 'body_mass_g' for the axes. The R script is to be written in /home/ga/RProjects/analysis.R, and the scatter plot is expected to be saved to /home/ga/RProjects/output/penguin_scatter.png with a minimum file size of 10KB, exactly matching the metadata claims and the verifier parameters.
